query: SELECT id, primary_domain, status, overall_risk_score, JSON_LENGTH(pipeline_output) as pipeline_size FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primary_domain LIKE '%aceofcloud%' OR primary_domain LIKE '%AceofCloud%' OR pipeline_output IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
